top_signals.title: SeaCube Provides Portable Refrigerated Containers for Historic New York Harbor Celebration
top_signals.summary: SeaCube was proud to serve as an official sponsor of Sail4th 250 by providing five branded portable refrigerated containers during the multi-day celebration honoring America’s 250th anniversary from July 3–8, 2026, in New York Harbor.
